pre_game.message: Hey, I’m G. Just trying to settle the nerves a bit before things kick off—how are you feeling about all this?
Hey G, I'm E. I'm definitely feeling the pressure, but I'm mostly just ready to get started. It’s a big opportunity for all of us.
I hear that. It’s a huge deal for all of us. I’m mostly thinking about my family back home—do you have people you’re playing for too?
Absolutely. I've got family and some people close to me that I really want to take care of; it’s what’s keeping me focused.
That’s exactly how I feel. It’s a lot easier to stay driven when you’ve got people counting on you.
Exactly. It’s the best kind of motivation. Have you thought much about how you're going to approach the game itself?
I’m trying to keep an open mind until we see the rules, but I’d definitely prefer to play it straight and build some trust with everyone.
I agree, building trust early could be key to making sure we all come out ahead.
For sure. If we can rely on each other, it takes a lot of the pressure off.
I'm glad we're on the same page. It's definitely better to have allies than enemies in a game like this. I'll see you in there.
Couldn't agree more, E. Let's look out for each other out there and make our families proud. See you soon.
